title: Maple's Rabbit Collection
description: Seasonal rabbit variants with custom textures that change with the seasons! 🐰 New and Classic.
body:
✨Bring Some Bunny Bliss to Your Minecraft World 🐰

Custom designed rabbit textures to bring a little something extra to your gameplay.

The textures change automatically with the seasons! (can be turned off)

🌱 The Sapling mod needs to be installed in order for this mod to work 🌱


✨The super new 26.1 (and beyond) model is available! ✨

 

 


✨Ofcourse we can't forget about the Classic model!✨
Available for Minecraft 1.20.1, 1.21.1 and 1.21.11

 


-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

The rabbit variations spawn randomly across the world. 

The rabbits stay in their own skin when re-opening a world, collect 'm all! 🤗

🌸☀️🍂❄️

The textures will automatically change per season. There will also still be regular rabbits.

 

The season dates: day - month

🌸Spring:  01-03 / 31-05         ☀️Summer: 01-06 / 31-08 
🍂Autumn:  01-09 / 30-11          ❄️Winter:  01-12 / 28-02          

 

There is also an added command for which hemisphere you prefer! Northern or Southern 😊
(Northern is selected automatically)


‼️🏷️If you want to keep a certain rabbit texture on a specific rabbit for the whole year make sure to give

them a name tag before the new season starts! Otherwise, they will change. ‼️🏷️

 

Commands
⚙️To customize your experience.

 

Admin Tools
/maplemods rabbit adminTools flipSeasonDatesToOtherHemisphere   | To change the hemisphere
/maplemods rabbit adminTools resetAllLoadedEntityTextures   |  To reset the rabbits that are already loaded in the game
/maplemods rabbit adminTools reloadConfigFile  | To reload changes in the Config

 

Config Values
/maplemods rabbit setConfigValues showCurrentValues
/maplemods rabbit setConfigValues disableSeasonsDuringHoliday (false/true)  | Option to disable the mixture of the holidays and the seasonal textures.
/maplemods rabbit setConfigValues nameTagPreventsTexture (false/true)  | Option to save the texture with the name tag or to disable it.
/maplemods rabbit setConfigValues replaceSeasonalTextures  | To reload the textures after making a change.

 

Update Category Settings
/maplemods rabbit updateCategorySettings _default   | Disable or enable the original rabbit texture
/maplemods rabbit updateCategorySettings <category> (disable/enable/setDate)  | Customize the seasons

 

Update Texture Settings
/maplemods rabbit updateTextureSettings <texture> (disable/enable) | To specifically choose which textures to enable or disable

 

 

Very excited to finally design and launch my custom rabbits.

✨ Hope you enjoy seeing them hop around as much as I enjoyed creating them ✨

The seasonal textures are also available with:

 

The Bees! 🐝

The Chickens! 🐥

The Creepers!💚

 

More mobs coming soon!
